meaning: n.五行打油诗(一种通俗幽默短诗,有五行组成,韵式为aabba)
examples: Or God will toss off a limerick for your pleasure.
Unfortunately for Limerick people, quite a lot of us won't be at home that night.
Of course the poetry form called limerick takes its name from the Irish city called limerick.
We met Alan and Norah Fettle from Limerick, and Jimmy and Janey McAllister from Limavady.
Dr. Peadar Cremin, President of Mary Immaculate College, Limerick and Mr. Peter Power T.
